title: Distant Worlds Beyond
description: Adventure and exploration is just around the corner. Get lost into the beauty of Distant Horizons and more
body:
Created this modpack from scratch, because i wanted to explore using the new Distant Horizons mod. So the purpose of this modpack is to show a beautifull landscape that invites to explore and enjoy the beautifull panoramas. 

Unveil the mysteries of uncharted lands and unlock the secrets of the unknown in "Distant Worlds"

Key Features:

Vast and Varied Landscapes: Roam through expansive biomes, from towering mountain ranges to sprawling deserts and dense jungles. Each terrain offers its own challenges and hidden treasures waiting to be unearthed.

Dynamic Terrain Generation: Experience dynamic terrain generation that ensures no two landscapes are ever the same. Prepare to be awed by breathtaking vistas, hidden caverns, and natural wonders waiting to be discovered around every corner.

Limitless Discoveries: With a vast array of mods and customizations, "Distant Worlds" offers limitless opportunities for exploration and adventure. Whether you're a seasoned explorer or a novice adventurer, there's always something new to discover in the ever-expanding world of "Distant Worlds".
